case_number: constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. No case

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3479 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA No.14489/2022. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 30-11-2022 Mr. Muhammad Hanif Kalhoro advocate for petitioner. Petitioner claims to be sugarcane supplier and according to him he has supplied sugarcane to respondent Sakrand Sugar Mills Qazi Ahmed since 2014 has filed this petition to recover the outstanding amount against said Sugar Mill with interest. This kind of controversy requires recording to evidence which cannot be undertaken under constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. No case for indulgence is made out and accordingly this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application. However, petitioner is at liberty to approach an appropriate forum for redressal of his grievance. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
